title: polyosma robusta
intro: Polyosma robusta, also known as the New Zealand broadleaf or New Zealand native, is a small to medium-sized tree or shrub native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polyosma robusta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Polyosma robusta include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems.
